text: A passionate frontend developer with a strong foundation in creating user-friendly and visually appealing web experiences.
While my primary focus is frontend development, my learning journey has exposed me to various technologies including C++, Java, Python, C#, HTML, CSS, and SQL.
Currently expanding my skillset with JavaScript, MySQL, and React.
Eager to explore PHP, Ruby, jQuery, Pandas, and other relevant technologies.
Focus on web development and database management.
Obtained several certificates related to web development and other technologies.
Actively learning and building projects focused on frontend technologies.
Technologies Used: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, jQuery
Future Interests: PHP, Ruby, jQuery, Pandas
